first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions identify the same core strengths (technical depth, open-source work) and the same core weaknesses (German language proficiency, lack of formal architectural design, missing high-level leadership/client-facing experience). The minor differences in phrasing, such as describing the leadership gap as 'team management' versus 'IT consulting', fall within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not represent a meaningful change in evaluation tied to the job locations.
